ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_code" TEXT /* Code for the size (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size (e.g., XX-Small, X-Small, Small) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing category the size belongs to */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the size is intended for (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the size is standardized in (e.g., US, European, UK) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size is currently active in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the measurement belongs to */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement range (e.g., 27"-29") */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement range (e.g., 19"-21") */,
  "hips" TEXT /* Hips measurement range (e.g., 29-31) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing category the measurement belongs to */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the measurement is intended for (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "shoulder" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement range (e.g., 14"-15") */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement range (e.g., 22"-23") */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam measurement range (e.g., 28"-29") */,
  "rise" TEXT /* Rise measurement range (e.g., 8"-9") */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regional_sizes" (
  "regional_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regional size */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the regional size belongs to */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region (e.g., US, European, UK) */,
  "size_equivalent" TEXT /* Size equivalent in the region (e.g., 1-3, A, 34-36) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing category the regional size belongs to */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the regional size is intended for (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the regional size is currently active in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regional_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regional_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regional_sizes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing category the item belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the clothing item belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the clothing item belongs to */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the clothing item */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the clothing item */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the clothing item */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item is currently active in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "measurement_preferences" TEXT /* Measurement preferences (e.g., bust, waist, hips) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "order_total" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the brand is currently active in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category (e.g., Tops, Dresses, Pants) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is currently active in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Customer Service, Administrator, Manager) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is currently active in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
